name: Crystal Maiden
description: When Hell freezes over, I'll start calling it Heaven.

20.right: +0.2 Glacial Guard Mana Cost to Barrier Factor

abilities.name: Glacial Guard
abilities.description: Grants the Maiden a physical damage barrier corresponding to the mana cost spent on abilities. Mana Cost to Base Barrier: 0.3 (0.5). Mana Cost to Base Barrier Increase: 0.02.

abilities.name: Crystal Nova
abilities.description: Damages and applies movement speed slow to all enemy units in the area-targeted location. Cast Range: 700. Effect Radius: 425. Damage: 110/160/210/260 (410/460/510/560). Move Speed Slow: 20%/30%/40%/50%. Attack Speed Slow: 30/45/60/75. Duration: 4. Cooldown: 11/10/9/8 (6.5/5.5/4.5/3.5). Mana Cost: 115/135/155/175.

abilities.name: Frostbite
abilities.description: Encases an enemy unit in ice. Applies damage over time while prohibiting movement and attack. Rylai channels winds from the Blueheart Glacier, imprisoning attackers in thick blocks of ice. Cast Range: 600 (700). Damage per Second: 100. Bind Duration: 1.5/2/2.5/3 (2.5/3/3.5/4). Creep Damage Factor: 4. Cooldown: 9/8/7/6. Mana Cost: 125/135/145/155.

abilities.name: Arcane Aura
abilities.description: Grants additional mana regeneration to allied units on the map. Grants a greater bonus to allied units closer to the Maiden. Grants the Maiden incoming mana regeneration amplification. Base Mana Regen Bonus: 0.4/0.6/0.8/1. Proximity Bonus Factor: 3. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Aura Radius: Global.

abilities.name: Crystal Clone
abilities.description: Creates a Crystal Clone of Rylai in her place while sliding to the area-targeted direction and disjointing incoming projectiles. Split Time: 0.02. Move Distance: 275. Move Duration: 0.3. Damage Threshold: 150. Damage Dealt: 100%. Damage Taken: 100%. Cooldown: 10. Mana Cost: 150.

abilities.name: Freezing Field
abilities.description: Increases both the frequency and the number of icy explosions. Max Channel Time: 10 (0). Effect Radius: 810. Min Explosion Spawn Radius: 195. Max Explosion Spawn Radius: 785. Explosion Damage Radius: 320. Explosion Spawn Interval: 0.1 (0.083). Cooldown: 100/95/90. Mana Cost: 200/400/600.
